creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 190664
svn diff for devel/qca

Sorry to bother you again... That wasn't completely functional yet.

I've updated the port to 2.1.3 and added the patch from upstream.

Please let me know if this is OK to commit.
Tested build of both devel/qca and devel/qca-qt5 on 11.1 amd64. Testport to be run a bit later when my OpenSSL 1.1 bulk build finishes.
